files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,117 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+# Mint a GitHub App installation token without relying on a JavaScript action.
+
+app_id=""
+private_key="${PRIVATE_KEY:-}"
+owner=""
+repository=""
+api_url="${GITHUB_API_URL:-https://api.github.com}"
+
+while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
+  case "$1" in
+    --app-id)
+      app_id="$2"
+      shift 2
+      ;;
+    --owner)
+      owner="$2"
+      shift 2
+      ;;
+    --repository)
+      repository="$2"
+      shift 2
+      ;;
+    --api-url)
+      api_url="$2"
+      shift 2
+      ;;
+    *)
+      echo "Unknown argument: $1" >&2
+      exit 1
+      ;;
+  esac
+done
+
+if [[ -z "$app_id" ]]; then
+  echo "Usage: $0 --app-id <id> [--owner <org> | --repository <owner/repo>] [--api-url <url>]" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+if [[ -z "$owner" && -z "$repository" ]]; then
+  echo "Either --owner or --repository must be set" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+if [[ -z "$private_key" ]]; then
+  echo "PRIVATE_KEY environment variable must be set" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+if [[ -n "$repository" && "$repository" != */* ]]; then
+  echo "Repository must be in <owner/repo> form: $repository" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+b64url() {
+  openssl base64 -A | tr '+/' '-_' | tr -d '='
+}
+
+now="$(date +%s)"
+iat="$((now - 60))"
+exp="$((now + 540))"
+header='{"alg":"RS256","typ":"JWT"}'
+payload="$(printf '{\"iat\":%s,\"exp\":%s,\"iss\":\"%s\"}' "$iat" "$exp" "$app_id")"
+
+key_file="$(mktemp)"
+cleanup() {
+  rm -f "$key_file"
+}
+trap cleanup EXIT
+chmod 600 "$key_file"
+printf '%s' "$private_key" >"$key_file"
+
+unsigned_token="$(printf '%s' "$header" | b64url).$(printf '%s' "$payload" | b64url)"
+signature="$(printf '%s' "$unsigned_token" | openssl dgst -binary -sha256 -sign "$key_file" | b64url)"
+jwt="$unsigned_token.$signature"
+echo "::add-mask::$jwt"
+
+api_headers=(
+  -H "Authorization: Bearer $jwt"
+  -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json"
+  -H "X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28"
+)
+
+if [[ -n "$repository" ]]; then
+  installation_json="$(curl -fsSL "${api_headers[@]}" "$api_url/repos/$repository/installation")"
+else
+  installation_json="$(curl -fsSL "${api_headers[@]}" "$api_url/orgs/$owner/installation")"
+fi
+installation_id="$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)["id"])' <<<"$installation_json")"
+
+if [[ -n "$repository" ]]; then
+  repo_name="${repository#*/}"
+  request_body="$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.dumps({"repositories": [sys.argv[1]]}))' "$repo_name")"
+  token_json="$(curl -fsSL -X POST "${api_headers[@]}" "$api_url/app/installations/$installation_id/access_tokens" -d "$request_body")"
+else
+  token_json="$(curl -fsSL -X POST "${api_headers[@]}" "$api_url/app/installations/$installation_id/access_tokens")"
+fi
+
+token="$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)["token"])' <<<"$token_json")"
+
+if [[ -z "$token" || "$token" == "null" ]]; then
+  echo "Failed to create a GitHub App installation token" >&2
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+echo "::add-mask::$token"
+
+if [[ -n "${GITHUB_OUTPUT:-}" ]]; then
+  {
+    echo "token=$token"
+    echo "installation-id=$installation_id"
+  } >>"$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+else
+  printf '%s\n' "$token"
+fi

@@ -44,23 +44,26 @@ jobs:
       DISCORD_CHANGELOG_WEBHOOK: ${{ secrets.DISCORD_CHANGELOG_WEBHOOK }}
       DISCORD_RELEASE_WEBHOOK: ${{ secrets.DISCORD_RELEASE_WEBHOOK }}
     steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v5
+
       - name: Generate app token
         id: app-token
-        uses: actions/create-github-app-token@v1
-        with:
-          app-id: ${{ vars.TENZIR_GITHUB_APP_ID }}
-          private-key: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}
-          owner: tenzir
+        env:
+          APP_ID: ${{ vars.TENZIR_GITHUB_APP_ID }}
+          PRIVATE_KEY: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}
+          TARGET_OWNER: tenzir
+        run: |
+          ./.github/scripts/create-app-token.sh \
+            --app-id "$APP_ID" \
+            --owner "$TARGET_OWNER"
 
       - name: Resolve target directory
         id: resolve
         run: |
           target="${{ inputs.target }}"
           echo "dir=${target:-${{ inputs.project }}}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
 
-      - name: Checkout repository
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
-
       - name: Validate project name
         env:
           GH_TOKEN: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token }}
@@ -76,7 +79,7 @@ jobs:
           GH_TOKEN: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token }}
         run: |
           git clone --depth 1 \
-            https://x-access-token:${GH_TOKEN}@github.com/tenzir/${{ inputs.project }}.git \
+            "https://x-access-token:${GH_TOKEN}@github.com/tenzir/${{ inputs.project }}.git" \
             /tmp/source
           echo "sha=$(git -C /tmp/source rev-parse --short HEAD)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
 
@@ -99,7 +102,11 @@ jobs:
         if: inputs.extra_paths != ''
         run: |
           cd /tmp/source
-          for pattern in ${{ inputs.extra_paths }}; do
+          EXTRA_PATHS='${{ inputs.extra_paths }}'
+          # shellcheck disable=SC2206 # Intentional splitting of a space-separated input.
+          patterns=($EXTRA_PATHS)
+          for pattern in "${patterns[@]}"; do
+            # shellcheck disable=SC2086 # Intentional glob expansion from configured patterns.
             for path in $pattern; do
               if [[ -d "$path" ]]; then
                 mkdir -p "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}/$path"
@@ -110,7 +117,11 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Clean orphaned extra paths
         if: inputs.extra_paths != ''
-        run: .github/scripts/clean-orphaned-paths.sh "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}" ${{ inputs.extra_paths }}
+        run: |
+          EXTRA_PATHS='${{ inputs.extra_paths }}'
+          # shellcheck disable=SC2206 # Intentional splitting of a space-separated input.
+          paths=($EXTRA_PATHS)
+          .github/scripts/clean-orphaned-paths.sh "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}" "${paths[@]}"
 
       - name: Stage changes
         run: git add .
@@ -127,7 +138,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Set up Python
         if: env.DISCORD_CHANGELOG_WEBHOOK != '' || env.DISCORD_RELEASE_WEBHOOK != ''
-        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+        uses: actions/setup-python@v6
         with:
           python-version: "3.12"
